sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54151" key="kata/kissos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάκισσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n54151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ivy-wreathed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4105.tlg001:41:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacreont.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
